en_title: Final Fantasy 7 Revelation Director Confirms New Voice Actor for Sephiroth
cn_title: 《最终幻想7 启示录》萨菲罗斯换声优
subtitle: 新声优接棒
opus_summary: 史克威尔艾尼克斯确认《最终幻想7 启示录》萨菲罗斯英文配音换为Tarvis Willingham，原配音Tyler Hoechlin因档期冲突退出。游戏2027年春季登陆多平台。

paragraphs.en: Square Enix has confirmed the English voice actor for Sephiroth has been recast for Final Fantasy 7 Revelation .
paragraphs.cn: 史克威尔艾尼克斯已确认，《最终幻想7 启示录》中萨菲罗斯的英文配音演员将换人。

paragraphs.en: Director Naoki Hamaguchi confirmed the One-Winged Angel would sound a bit different in the upcoming remake continuation during an interview with YouTuber and Final Fantasy 7 aficionado Maximilian Dood . He showed up to share more about Square Enix's latest just hours after its Summer Game Fest 2026 reveal trailer pulled back the curtain with a first look at gameplay and a Sephiroth with a lower, gravellier voice.
paragraphs.cn: 导演滨口直树在接受油管主兼《最终幻想7》爱好者Maximilian Dood采访时确认，这位「片翼天使」在即将到来的重制续作中声音会有所不同。就在2026年夏日游戏节预告片首次展示游戏玩法，并呈现了一个声音更低沉沙哑的萨菲罗斯几小时后，滨口直树现身分享了更多关于史克威尔艾尼克斯这款新作的信息。

paragraphs.en: Fans had immediately noticed the character sounded different from the performance actor Tyler Hoechlin delivered in Final Fantasy 7 Remake and Rebirth. Hamaguchi said this is, in fact, due to the role being recast because Hoechlin was unavailable during development.
paragraphs.cn: 粉丝们立刻注意到，这个角色的声音与演员Tyler Hoechlin在《最终幻想7 重制版》和《重生》中的演绎不同。滨口直树表示，这实际上是因为角色被重新选角，Hoechlin在开发期间无法参与。

paragraphs.en: For Final Fantasy 7 Revelation, fans will instead hear Tarvis Willingham – an actor with a long, long history in video games, movies, and shows – playing the English version of Sephiroth. His resume is so filled with projects that, chances are, you've probably heard his voice at least once, if not a few times, through the years.
paragraphs.cn: 在《最终幻想7 启示录》中，粉丝们将听到Tarvis Willingham——一位在游戏、电影和电视剧领域有着悠久历史的演员——为萨菲罗斯的英文版配音。他的履历作品之多，以至于你很可能在过去几年里至少听过一次他的声音，甚至不止几次。

paragraphs.en: Sonic the Hedgehog fans might recognize Willingham as the voice behind Knuckles in Sonic Boom, while Fullmetal Alchemist: Brotherhood watchers will know him as Roy Mustang. In addition to being one of the many faces behind Dungeons & Dragons show Critical Role and Thor in many Marvel projects, Willingham has even provided his talents to both the Final Fantasy and Kingdom Hearts series in the past.
paragraphs.cn: 《刺猬索尼克》的粉丝可能会认出Willingham是《索尼克爆破》中纳克鲁斯的配音，而《钢之炼金术师FA》的观众会知道他是罗伊·马斯坦的配音。除了是《龙与地下城》节目《Critical Role》的众多面孔之一，以及在许多漫威项目中为雷神配音外，Willingham过去还曾为《最终幻想》和《王国之心》系列贡献过他的才华。

paragraphs.en: While Willingham will bring a lot of experience to Sephiroth in Final Fantasy 7 Revelation, some fans will no doubt be at least a bit disappointed to hear that Hoechlin has exited the role just as the trilogy comes to a head. There's also the fact that Hoechlin played Sephiroth not only for Remake and Rebirth but Crisis Core: Final Fantasy Reunion and Final Fantasy 7: The First Soldier, too.
paragraphs.cn: 尽管Willingham将为《最终幻想7 启示录》中的萨菲罗斯带来丰富的经验，但一些粉丝无疑会感到至少有些失望，因为Hoechlin就在三部曲迎来高潮之际退出了这个角色。此外，Hoechlin不仅在《重制版》和《重生》中为萨菲罗斯配音，还在《核心危机：最终幻想7 重聚》和《最终幻想7：第一战士》中扮演过这一角色。

paragraphs.en: It's too soon to tell how players who have followed Square Enix's Final Fantasy 7 Remake journey will respond to the voice actor switch. Although fans got a nice, long look at how Final Fantasy 7 Revelation will send Cloud and company into the future, the publisher was reluctant to share its release date outside of the promise to launch simultaneously across PC via Steam and Epic Games Store, Nintendo Switch 2, PlayStation 5, and Xbox Series X | S in spring 2027.
paragraphs.cn: 现在判断追随史克威尔艾尼克斯《最终幻想7 重制版》旅程的玩家们会对配音演员更换作何反应还为时过早。尽管粉丝们得以长时间欣赏《最终幻想7 启示录》如何将克劳德一行人送入未来，但发行商不愿透露具体发售日期，只承诺将于2027年春季同步登陆PC（Steam和Epic Games Store）、Nintendo Switch 2、PlayStation 5和Xbox Series X|S。

paragraphs.en: We'll surely get to hear more from Willingham's performance as Sephiroth in the coming months. Until then, you can check out everything announced at Summer Game Fest 2026 .
paragraphs.cn: 在接下来的几个月里，我们肯定会听到更多Willingham饰演萨菲罗斯的表现。在此之前，你可以查看2026年夏日游戏节上公布的所有内容。
